payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Start with captured fees and adjustments. This workspace does not show organizer balances or payout status by itself.

contextBanner.title: There are payouts here, but no captured charges yet
contextBanner.description: We found {payoutCount} payout lifecycle events in the selected period, but no captured charges or financial adjustments. That is why Overview and Risk are showing zeros.

investigation.lookupIdle: Start with a payout ID, a trace, or another technical identifier.
investigation.evidenceActive: An evidence pack is currently loaded.
investigation.evidenceIdle: Load a trace when you need to review evidence.
investigation.guidanceDescription: This works with payout IDs, traces, and other technical identifiers shared by support or engineering. If you do not have one of those identifiers yet, this view will not help much.
investigation.whereToFindIdsTitle: Where those IDs usually come from
investigation.whereToFindIdsDescription: Payout IDs come from organizer payments. Traces come from Cases, Evidence, or support tooling. Idempotency keys are usually shared only by support or engineering.

overview.heroActiveDescription: This summarizes platform fees captured in the selected period and any financial adjustments applied to them.
overview.heroIdleDescription: There are no captured charges or financial adjustments in this period.
overview.windowDescription: Everything below uses this period as the reference window.
overview.statusActive: There is financial activity to review. The detail below breaks it down by currency and MXN conversion.
overview.statusIdle: There is no reportable financial activity in this period yet.
overview.revenueIdleTitle: There are no captured fees to break down yet
overview.revenueIdleDescription: Once captured fees or adjustments exist in this period, the breakdown by currency and reason will appear here.
overview.conversionIdleTitle: There is no MXN conversion to review yet
overview.conversionIdleDescription: MXN conversion will appear once captured fees exist in the selected period.

risk.heroAttentionDescription: Use this to decide which charges, organizers, or events deserve intervention first.
risk.heroQuietTitle: There is no active debt or dispute in this period
risk.heroQuietDescription: Until captured charges accumulate financial incidents, this view will stay quiet.
risk.reviewExposureDescription: Check whether the amount at risk is concentrated in a small number of organizers or events.
risk.reviewCasesDescription: If disputes are active, prioritize groups with the most open cases before drilling deeper.
risk.reviewPausesDescription: Treat them as an operational block signal before trying to resume or keep charging.
risk.detailIdleTitle: No organizer or event clusters need follow-up right now
risk.detailIdleDescription: When debt, disputes, or policy pauses appear around captured charges, this area will break them down by organizer and by event.

operationsGuidance.fxDescription: Use this only when captured charges already exist in another currency and you need a reference rate to convert those charges into MXN for reporting.
operationsGuidance.artifactsDescription: Use this when support needs to regenerate or resend the technical statement for a payout. You get the payout trace from Cases or Evidence.

sections.operationsNote: Manual actions stay here so they do not compete with the overall readout.

overview.title: Financial overview
overview.description: Start here to understand the overall picture before moving into operational tools.

risk.title: Debt and disputes
risk.description: Review the areas that deserve attention first when exposure or open cases appear.

fx.title: Exchange rates
fx.description: Review missing or stale rates before opening the update form.

artifacts.title: Statements and resends
artifacts.description: Review recent versions and deliveries before opening a manual operation.

cases.title: Find a case
cases.description: Find the right trace before moving into evidence.

evidence.title: Load evidence
evidence.description: Open an evidence pack only after you know which trace you want to inspect.

payments.sectionDescription: Primary readout of platform fees captured and financial adjustments applied to them.
payments.primaryMetricDescription: Captured platform fees plus financial adjustments in the reviewed period.
payments.currenciesDescription: How captured fees are distributed by source currency.
payments.traceabilityDescription: Period and references used to build this view.
payments.sampleTracesEmpty: No trace references found in the selected window.
payments.emptyAdjustments: No financial adjustments were found for the selected window.

exposure.sectionDescription: Helps identify where staff should intervene first when captured charges accumulate debt or disputes.
exposure.emptyState: No debt or dispute exposure data was found for the selected window.

mxn.sectionDescription: MXN conversion of captured fees using the available reference rates.
mxn.tableDescription: Each source currency retains original totals and snapshot references used for MXN conversion.
mxn.emptyState: No source-currency events were found for the selected window.

fx.sectionDescription: Register the reference rate used to convert captured fees into MXN when the original charge happened in another currency.
fx.upsertDescription: Use this when a day is missing its reference rate or when support needs to correct an existing one.
fx.ratesTableDescription: Latest daily rates configured for active currencies.
fx.emptyRates: No daily FX rates are configured yet.
fx.noActions: There are no missing or stale rates in the reviewed period.

artifacts.sectionDescription: Regenerate or resend the technical statement for a payout when support needs it.
artifacts.formDescription: You need the payout trace. You can get it from Cases or Evidence.
artifacts.recentVersionsDescription: Version history generated for each trace.
artifacts.recentDeliveriesDescription: Delivery attempts associated with each trace.
artifacts.versionsEmpty: No statements have been generated yet.
artifacts.deliveriesEmpty: No resend attempts have been recorded yet.

caseLookup.sectionDescription: Start here when support shares a payout ID, a trace, or another technical identifier.
caseLookup.searchDescription: You can search by payout ID, trace, or technical keys shared by support or engineering.
caseLookup.queryPlaceholder: Payout ID, trace, or technical key...
caseLookup.noQueryState: Enter a trace or related identifier to find the correct case before opening evidence.
caseLookup.noResultsState: We could not find a case for that identifier. Check the trace, payout request ID, or idempotency key.
caseLookup.disambiguationDescription: When one identifier maps to multiple traces, use this grouping to disambiguate.
caseLookup.disambiguationEmpty: No ambiguous matches were detected for this lookup.
caseLookup.resultsDescription: Cases are grouped by trace with normalized identifier evidence and role-appropriate metadata.

evidence.sectionDescription: Once you have a trace, this view shows its technical history, statements, and policy context.
evidence.requestDescription: Paste a trace obtained from Cases or from support tooling.
evidence.noTraceState: Once you have the right trace, load it here to review its history, artifacts, and policy context.
evidence.notFoundTitle: No evidence found for that trace
evidence.notFoundState: That trace did not return an evidence pack. Verify the identifier or go back to case lookup.
evidence.summaryDescription: Canonical trace history, key timestamps, and redaction metadata.
evidence.policyContextEmpty: No additional policy context was found for this trace.
evidence.eventsDescription: Canonical trace events used to build case evidence.
